judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim text (stamp '8 JUL 2 1963', number 'REG-36 62-83894-428', handwritten 'acd 6/27/63') not mentioned by Description A, and Description A claims a 'red stamped date' while Description B specifies the exact date, creating a contradiction in the specificity of quoted text.
original_image_tags: A scanned document, a typed letter on white paper with several handwritten annotations and a red stamped date. The letter is addressed to the FBI and asks questions about the withholding of information regarding unidentified flying objects and captured extraterrestrial craft.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typed letter on FBI letterhead, dated 8 Jul 1963, addressed to the FBI in Washington, D.C.; no photograph or diagram, with handwritten signatures/notations and red archival stamps/marks.*
